queries.question: What dance recitals are in Room 202, and what talent shows are in the same room?
queries.sql:
SELECT Dance_Recital.name
FROM Audition_Room JOIN Dance_Recital ON Audition_Room.RoomID = Dance_Recital.RoomID
WHERE Audition_Room.RoomName = "Room 202"
UNION
SELECT Talent_Show.name
FROM Audition_Room JOIN Talent_Show ON Audition_Room.RoomID = Talent_Show.RoomID
WHERE Audition_Room.RoomName = "Room 202"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?audition_room a :Audition_Room .
    ?dance_recital a :Dance_Recital .
    ?dance_recital p:hasAudition_Room ?audition_room .
    ?dance_recital p:name ?name .
    ?audition_room p:RoomName ?roomname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?roomname_f) = "Room 202")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?audition_room a :Audition_Room .
    ?talent_show a :Talent_Show .
    ?talent_show p:hasAudition_Room ?audition_room .
    ?talent_show p:name ?name .
    ?audition_room p:RoomName ?roomname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?roomname_f) = "Room 202")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Give a list of all dance recitals and also list talent shows in Room 202.
queries.sql:
SELECT Dance_Recital.name
FROM Audition_Room JOIN Dance_Recital ON Audition_Room.RoomID = Dance_Recital.RoomID
UNION
SELECT Talent_Show.name
FROM Audition_Room JOIN Talent_Show ON Audition_Room.RoomID = Talent_Show.RoomID
WHERE Audition_Room.RoomName = "Room 202"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?audition_room a :Audition_Room .
    ?dance_recital a :Dance_Recital .
    ?dance_recital p:hasAudition_Room ?audition_room .
    ?dance_recital p:name ?name .
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?audition_room a :Audition_Room .
    ?talent_show a :Talent_Show .
    ?talent_show p:hasAudition_Room ?audition_room .
    ?talent_show p:name ?name .
    ?audition_room p:RoomName ?roomname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?roomname_f) = "Room 202")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide dance recitals and talent shows in Room 202
